seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by TH Entertainment.
description: From the Publisher Create Lasting Memories! "Jude Bellingham: The Boy Who Dreamed Of Being A Champion" is a gateway to a world where parents and children can share in the exhilarating beauty of soccer while imbibing invaluable life lessons. As families delve into the captivating narratives within these pages, they embark on a journey that transcends the mere act of reading. With each turn of the page, parents and children alike are immersed in tales of triumph, perseverance, and the unwavering spirit of resilience that defines the beautiful game. Inspire them! This book will encourage them to be more active, exercise physically, and participate in football and other sports, contributing to a healthy lifestyle. Engage and Instil Positive Behavior! Engaging and well-illustrated biographies like this one encourage children to read more. The captivating story of Jude Bellingham will keep them hooked, fostering a love for reading and helping to improve their literacy skills in an enjoyable way. Book 2 -The Most Amazing Soccer Stories of All Time - For Kids! Lionel Messi: The Boy Who Dreamed Of Being A Champion Cristiano Ronaldo: The Boy Who Dreamed Of Being A Champion The Most Inspirational Women's Soccer Stories Of All Time -- for Teenage Girls!
